description: Phase 14 - Final Audit: Create comprehensive production-readiness assessment document at docs/FINAL_PRODUCTION_READINESS.md
steps: Create docs/FINAL_PRODUCTION_READINESS.md with the following structure:
Title: Final Production Readiness Assessment - LDO-2 EDMS
Executive Summary with overall go/no-go recommendation

Before/After Metrics Table: TypeScript errors (before: many, after: 0), test count (before: ~few, after: 600+), production build (before: failing, after: passing), code quality score, feature completeness
Achievements Section listing all phases completed (0-14)
Remaining Risks section with severity ratings
Deferred Items section with justification for each
Appendix: list of all new files created across all phases
Commit with: docs: add final production readiness assessment
acceptance_criteria: docs/FINAL_PRODUCTION_READINESS.md exists and is well-formatted markdown
Contains before/after metrics table with concrete numbers
Contains scoring for all 10 areas with justification
Contains remaining risks and deferred items
References actual test counts, file counts, and build status from the project
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && npx tsc --noEmit (still passes after adding doc)
